---
name: Report an Issue
about: Report an incorrect term, typo, or formatting problem
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## Description

Clearly describe the issue you found.

## Location

- [ ] In the glossary (`ai-tamil-glossary.md`)
- [ ] In a reference document (`docs-glossary/`)
- [ ] In documentation (README, CONTRIBUTING, etc.)
- [ ] Other: __________

**Specific term or section**:

## Expected

What should the correct term, definition, or formatting be?

## Actual

What does it currently say?

## Impact

- [ ] High — incorrect term widely used
- [ ] Medium — minor inaccuracy
- [ ] Low — formatting or typo

## Suggested Fix (optional)

If you have a correction, please describe it.
